raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"Contribution claims ('no auxiliary critic network,' 'no labeled feedback data') and the gap statement require verification against the described mechanism; the perturbed-readout step may itself constitute an implicit auxiliary component, creating tension with the stated novelty.","R1.2":"Load-bearing: the section contains an explicit internal contradiction — the Experimental Setup specifies a 5-layer GIN with hidden dimension 256, while the Architecture and Ablations section states 'Our 3-layer GIN with hidden dimension 128 was used for all experiments described above.' This inconsistency undermines every reported result and cannot be left unresolved.","R1.3":"Load-bearing: the Validation section presents ROC-AUC improvement (0.812 → 0.847) as 'confirmation' of a 7.2% relative accuracy improvement; accuracy and AUC are distinct metrics and one does not confirm the other, constituting a broken evidence-to-claim chain.","R1.6":"Section review standardly encompasses prose quality; the Validation paragraph's hedged framing ('we take this as confirmation') and the Mechanism section's causal attribution language warrant tightening for precision.","R1.7":"'Building on recent work that uses a model's own outputs as a feedback signal' is uncited; without explicit references, prior-art coverage and attribution cannot be assessed."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should this review prioritize technical correctness (logical consistency, experimental validity, evidence-to-claim alignment) or writing and presentation quality (clarity, prose, structure)?"}

rationale.R1.1: Contribution claims ('no auxiliary critic network,' 'no labeled feedback data') and the gap statement require verification against the described mechanism; the perturbed-readout step may itself constitute an implicit auxiliary component, creating tension with the stated novelty.
rationale.R1.2: Load-bearing: the section contains an explicit internal contradiction — the Experimental Setup specifies a 5-layer GIN with hidden dimension 256, while the Architecture and Ablations section states 'Our 3-layer GIN with hidden dimension 128 was used for all experiments described above.' This inconsistency undermines every reported result and cannot be left unresolved.
rationale.R1.3: Load-bearing: the Validation section presents ROC-AUC improvement (0.812 → 0.847) as 'confirmation' of a 7.2% relative accuracy improvement; accuracy and AUC are distinct metrics and one does not confirm the other, constituting a broken evidence-to-claim chain.
rationale.R1.6: Section review standardly encompasses prose quality; the Validation paragraph's hedged framing ('we take this as confirmation') and the Mechanism section's causal attribution language warrant tightening for precision.
rationale.R1.7: 'Building on recent work that uses a model's own outputs as a feedback signal' is uncited; without explicit references, prior-art coverage and attribution cannot be assessed.

parsed.clarification_question: Should this review prioritize technical correctness (logical consistency, experimental validity, evidence-to-claim alignment) or writing and presentation quality (clarity, prose, structure)?
